_comment: Tier-2 for kratos poisson#: empirical resolution of the LaplacianElement HEAT_FLUX contradiction. On a P1 unit-right triangle with HEAT_FLUX=10 set on all nodes, LaplacianElement2D3N.CalculateRightHandSide returns RHS = 1.66667 = 10*area/3 on every node — the classic linear-shape-function consistent load. With HEAT_FLUX=0 the RHS is exactly 0. This conclusively shows LaplacianElement DOES assemble the HEAT_FLUX volumetric source term. The catalog claims (data/kratos_knowledge.py L1908 and src/backends/kratos/generators/poisson.py pitfall #1) that say 'does NOT assemble HEAT_FLUX' are FALSE and must be removed. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (Kratos 10.4.2 + KratosConvectionDiffusionApplication 10.4.2).
